ddls:
CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution center */,
  "city_code" INTEGER /* Code of the city where the center is located */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Code of the region where the center is located */,
  "center_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the center */,
  "op_area" REAL /* Operational area of the center in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the center was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the center was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the center (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the center */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* The contact number for the center */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address for the center */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* The latitude of the center's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* The longitude of the center's location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum capacity of the center in terms of volume or weight */,
  "operational_hours_start" TEXT /* The start time of the center's operational hours */,
  "operational_hours_end" TEXT /* The end time of the center's operational hours */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* The date of the last audit conducted at the center */,
  "audit_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of audits (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centers_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centers_city_code FOREIGN KEY ("city_code") REFERENCES cities ("city_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centers_center_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_type_id") REFERENCES center_types ("center_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "center_types" (
  "center_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the center type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the center type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum capacity for centers of this type */,
  "min_operational_area" REAL /* The minimum operational area required for centers of this type */,
  "operational_requirements" TEXT /* Any specific operational requirements for centers of this type */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of maintenance required for centers of this type (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Code of the region where the city is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the city record was last updated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* The elevation of the city in meters */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* The latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* The longitude of the city */,
  "nearest_major_city" TEXT /* The name of the nearest major city */,
  "nearest_major_city_distance" INTEGER /* The distance to the nearest major city in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country where the region is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the region record was last updated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* The latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* The longitude of the region */,
  "nearest_major_city" TEXT /* The name of the nearest major city */,
  "nearest_major_city_distance" INTEGER /* The distance to the nearest major city in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password of the user (hashed) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* The role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* The name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "center_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the center */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* The date of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* The type of operation (e.g., inventory check, maintenance) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the operation (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the operation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the operation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_center_operations_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)
